_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-09 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1390.9 is above EMA18 (1373.26) and EMA50 (1333.41) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (28.58) is below its signal line (29.18) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1364.9) and resistance (1407.3) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -0.65%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.

SUNPHARMA.name: SUNPHARMA
SUNPHARMA.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads). Don't read '6/6' as higher conviction than a 4/6 or 5/6 signal. Signals based on 2026-07-09 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Strike interval is an approximation — verify actual listed strikes in Kite option chain. No lot size shown (not available from any live source) — figures are per-share, not total cost. ⚠ LIQUIDITY UNVERIFIED — no open-interest or bid-ask data exists anywhere in this system; this strike is chosen by moneyness only and may be thin or wide-spread. Check the live option chain before assuming it's fillable near this premium.
SUNPHARMA.commentary: BUY_CE (6/6 votes): price 1935.9 is above EMA18 (1867.64) and EMA50 (1828.65) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (26.56) is above its signal line (19.01) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price broke above pivot resistance R1 (1919.33) -- breakout confirmed (+2 CE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 4.01%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
